title: Sortable Trait Parameters
description: Controls column sorting behavior in list and table views.

defaultSortField.description: The field name to sort by on initial load. Empty means no default sort.

defaultSortDirection.description: Default sort direction on initial load.

sortableFields.description: List of field names that support sorting. When empty, all fields are sortable.

triStateSort.description: When true, sort cycles through ascending, descending, none. When false, toggles between ascending and descending only.
